feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Propaganda movies
entry.content: Which one is your favorite? which director will be bought for the next wokeflop? post your bets.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: early access is the worst thing to happen to games in the last twenty years indi…
entry.content: early access is the worst thing to happen to games in the last twenty years indie devs get to put out an hour of gameplay and then feed off people buying the initial game for the next ten years while they slowly drip feed content at a glacial pace rather than actually just putting out a finished game for people to play fuck indie devs
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Please share some FBNEO and mame romset that only has the best games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: IMAX
entry.content: This has to be the most unnecessary, expensive, over-the-top, useless piece of fucking shit technology on the face of earth. It's also a pain to work with and few theaters out there are equipped to reproduce this format, and nobody gives a flying fuck to watch it. All of this so you can see 2 inches above the characters heads.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >DA DUBBA YUUUU beeeEEEEeeee
entry.content: >DA DUBBA YUUUU beeeEEEEeeee
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Anyone of you gays have one of these? What do YOU think? Need a good "crossover"…
entry.content: Anyone of you gays have one of these? What do YOU think? Need a good "crossover" that can handle some light off-road and not be terrible for city/hwy driving. I live in Chile btw. Most of our roads are quite good but when you go to cool camping or hiking places, it's always 300-800KM of pristine asphalt, then 30-50km of bad rutted washboarded mountain roads. So it needs to be good at both. I'm looking at a 2.0L AWD model, they go for around $28k new.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I saw the newest advengers trailer and I thought it was a little silly for one, …
entry.content: I saw the newest advengers trailer and I thought it was a little silly for one, here we go again with the whole war theme, Thor gives a gian speech in the trailer like he's a coach for a highschool football squad. It's just so obvious when Marvel starts to do it, but wars aren't really fought that way. You don' really just stand in a giant huge group of people and run at the opposing side in a huge empty field. They'll never show how war is really fought, I learned all about this in the military
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: why is mind fuckery the only type of magic that turned out to be real hypnotism,…
entry.content: why is mind fuckery the only type of magic that turned out to be real hypnotism, OBEs, meditation, lucid dreaming, psychedelics, maybe even psychics, its all real but wheres everything else?
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >nations with anti ai public: white countries, Japan, Korea >nations with pro ai…
entry.content: >nations with anti ai public: white countries, Japan, Korea >nations with pro ai public: india, pakistan, bangladesh, china, nigeria, latam, turkey, russia, north africa, indonesia etc why does /g/ support brown coded technology? even the AI overlords gleefully supported unrestrained pajeet outsourcing in the US until there was too much public backlash. This board used to release its own gentoo distro and now all it does is pray for the LLM to give them more code or imagegen sloppa.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PQ wallet v2
entry.content: PQ wallet v2 Offline, client side, Post Quantum resistant cryptographic wallet and tool for use with email, text, forums, untrusted transport. Use it on the go, with mobile device, or remotely. Self host it, post it when you need it, access it anywhere a browser is available. Now with a general symmetric tool for encrypting files or string with PQ resistant AES. ----start of signed text---- White paper: https://files.catbox.moe/oc710p.pdf Wallet Diagram: https://files.catbox.moe/udkqvt.pdf For c
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: TVRAN
entry.content: The word for sea in Turkish, Mongolian, and Hungarian all come from the same root word Hungarian: >tenger Turkish: >deniz Mongolian: >tengis Turkish one does not have ng because Modern Turkish had a ng to n shift and Hungarian one ends with r because they probably inherited the word from the Oghuric branch of Turkic languages which had a z to r shift
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: Chinese and Koreans are spiritually Jewish.
entry.content: And I mean this in a good-faith way. They are stereotyped as people who'd rather do math then find a girlfriend or try out sports. They follow their own special version of kosher (sort of) where red meats are de-emphasized in favor of fish, soy, kreplach-esque dumplings, and stuff like kimchi which BTW is literally Korean sauerkraut. Can hardly get much more Jewish than that imho. Their relationship with Western Christian culture often involves assimilation or acceptance struggles, and often vai
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /b/ Random: Chinese and Koreans are spiritually Jewish.
entry.content: And I don't even mean this in a /pol/ "hurr durr heil hotler" way. Just look at them. They're bugmen who'd rather do math then find a girlfriend or try out sports. They follow their own special version of kosher (sort of) where red meats are de-emphasized in favor of fish, soy, kreplach-esque dumplings, and stuff like kimchi which BTW is literally Korean sauerkraut. Can hardly get much more Jewish than that imho. They keep trying to ass-kiss and sneak-identify into Western Christian culture, yet
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: AMA lost my world cup bet to my spanish friend
entry.content: so me and my friend have this retarded rivalry every tournament. im a massive messi fan, he is a smug spanish cunt. before the final i was talking so much shit about how argentina was gonna win and messi was gonna end it on a high. he kept saying spain was winning it. so we made a bet if spain wins i have to do whatever punishment he picks. spain 1 0 extra time, of fucking course. his punishment was doing a temporary spanish flag tattoo all over my ass AND balls plus and walk completely naked do
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /news/ News: DOJ’s Reflecting Pool “Vandalism” Case Falls Apart With Pool Draining
entry.content: https://www.washingtonpost.com/dc-m d-va/2026/07/20/reflecting-pool-rep airs-could-undermine-case-against-f ormer-olympian-judge-says/ Repair work at the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool done after a former Olympic canoeist was accused of damaging it could jeopardize the government’s case against him, a D.C. Superior Court judge warned Monday. The government is “operating at its own peril,” said Judge Todd E. Edelman, if the Reflecting Pool is altered or not preserved before the defense’s expert
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #3038
entry.content: >Workout Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84208438/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.org
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Babymetal
entry.content: >Babymetal IS NOT metal! You're just a butthurt chud who hates women and anything kawaii!! XD >Babymetal IS metal! They know their shit and even Rob Zombie says so!! Bitch, please. Whether they're metal or not is irrelative to their actual quality and technique as musicians. They are a corporate byproduct of Amuse Inc. and whether or not they also count as true metal is not reflective of them being a good metal band by default. They also have the most mid(dling) taste: BMTH? Metallica? Slipknot?
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /int/ International: QK
entry.content: >You're waiting at the bus stop when... >"Whatchu lookin' at, honkie?! Never seen a BLACK beautiful woman before?!!!" You have 10 seconds before she aggressively sucks your dick. How does the average man from your cunt get of this predicament?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: AMERICAN HISTORY X
entry.content: i just watched the movie because it was highly rated but i don't quite understand the message or the moral of the story you could say the thing that happened at the end is the punishment of the protagonist or something but it literally has nothing to do with him, he didnt start it and the won't end the whole issue, and he was tortured enough i think in the end the story kinda give him the reason that black people = violent monkeys, it would be way easier to understand if it was just nazis = bad

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Watched the long walk As with 99% of Stephen King movies, the ending sucked and …
entry.content: Watched the long walk As with 99% of Stephen King movies, the ending sucked and the premise feels wasted. Felt like they tried super hard to force an R rating via inserting curse words every other line, which is odd given the closeup death scenes likely wouldve gotten them it. And the ending is just dumb. Soldiers vanish after the major is shot because....because they do? Alternate where the winner actually does what he says he will do during the walk makes more sense but im guessing it was axed
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Reminder that they’re the same species, btw
entry.content: Pennywise uses his powers of reality and mind manipulation to produce fear in children to feed off of, whereas The Poppins does the same thing only with children’s joy. but the real kicker is when you find out they’re both the same species as The Cat in the Hat, who feeds off of chaos energy
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Human internet = Human verification
entry.content: To avoid deep fakes and bots, we all will have to be identified as humans at a genetic level with a chip. Thats the only way to have a human-only internet. There will be no other way to buy, sell or trade without guaranteed humanity when claimed. The future is bright.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: He was great
entry.content: Why do people mock Crazy Frog? He had some great songs and was the big hit of the 2000s. People say he was annoying, but his takes on "Axel F", "Popcorn" and "We Are the Champions" surpass the originals. To this day people think Axel F was a Crazy Frog original.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: You can now emulate Windows for Itanium processors on two different emulators. O…
entry.content: You can now emulate Windows for Itanium processors on two different emulators. One's a Ski fork, the other's a QEMU fork, all thanks to vibe coders, and recent LLM and frontier AI autism. Itaniumchads... are we back? Thoughts on the Itanic renaissance?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: why does everyone hate OOP? I'm a codelet, only been studying Python for 2 month…
entry.content: why does everyone hate OOP? I'm a codelet, only been studying Python for 2 months now, and so far it's been very comfy. For a group project we even made a simple drone show with Python commands. But everyone always taks about OOP like it's the worst thing in the world. We're finally learning Classes and it's... not bad? I don't get the hate. you're just defining an "object", assigning traits and creating it's own unique internal functions.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: Kia takes Michigan.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: /mu/ Draw thread
entry.content: Not a common thread around here, but why not try and have a drawthread dedicated to all things music? Draw album covers, singers/bands, characters interacting with music, devices that play music, instruments, generas, anything to do with the culture surrounding music. You can be a really good artist or just a Paint scribbler. Remember to enjoy yourself and have fun.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /news/ News: Eat the Lettuce. The Lettuce is Fine.
entry.content: Trump's FDA pretends that they're still doing a serious investigation after Trump received his bribe from Taylor farms https://www.notus.org/health-scienc e/fda-taylor-farms-false-positive Confusion swirled around the ongoing cyclosporiasis outbreak on Monday after the produce supplier linked to the illness pushed back against the Food and Drug Administration. FDA officials said in a press call on Monday that its investigation still points to Taylor Farms’ iceberg lettuce as the source of the ou
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: movie about sky scraper workers in the 1920s/30s back when they didnt get any sa…
entry.content: movie about sky scraper workers in the 1920s/30s back when they didnt get any safety devices. some family man in the great depression having to work this deadly job for peanuts and seeing his friends fall off and die multiple times but still has to just keep going to work the next day
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: It would be wrong, nay dumbfounded, to accuse Seth MacFarlane of being a really …
entry.content: It would be wrong, nay dumbfounded, to accuse Seth MacFarlane of being a really creepy guy. In safer reality, MacFarlane is merely a truust fuund baand. His entire existence, net worth, power and popularity can be traced entirely to his enormous trust fund that he inherited from his father who was a senior executive at Baskin Roberts. A hard pill to swallow: Seth MacFarlane is a trust's fund's band's.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film
